title: Who is Emilio
subtitle: Beyond the code — a glimpse into the person behind the engineer.

sports.title: Sports
sports.description: Triathlon enthusiast. Swimming, cycling, and running keep me disciplined and focused — the same qualities I bring to engineering.

books.title: Books
books.description: Avid reader of technical literature, systems design, and science fiction. Always learning, always curious.

games.title: Games
games.description: Zelda fan since childhood. The puzzle-solving and exploration mirror how I approach complex engineering challenges.

personality.title: Personality
personality.description: Curious, methodical, and driven. I thrive on solving hard problems and building things that matter.
